description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.7.4-alpine Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a compile-go job that runs `apk add --no-cache git`, changes directory to the project, fetches Go dependencies with `go get` for logrus, toml, and rancher-metadata, builds the binary with `go build -ldflags "-X 'main.Version=RAP Edition $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME' -X main.GitSHA=$CI_BUILD_REF"`, executes `./rancher-gen-rap --version`, renames the binary to `rancher-gen`, and publishes the `rancher-gen` file as an artifact named Rancher-Gen-RAP. In the deploy stage add a rebuild-rap job that installs curl via `apk add --no-cache curl` and then triggers another pipeline by posting to https://gitlab.com/api/v3/projects/2203465/trigger/builds with form fields token=$TOKEN_RAP and ref=$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME using `curl -X POST -F token=$TOKEN_RAP -F ref=$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME …`. Both jobs run on all branches with no additional rules, and no services or caches are defined.
